headline: Data Scientist & Technical Translator
intro_bi: End-to-end data exploration, feature engineering, and strategic dashboard architecture tailored for corporate telemetry.
intro_translation: High-precision translation, software internationalization, and cross-cultural versioning for technology enterprises.
intro_about: A comprehensive list of my academic path, professional courses, and computational technical training.

projects_bi.title: 2026 | Predictive Logistics Engineer
projects_bi.desc: DEVELOPMENT: Designing next-generation operational frameworks combining advanced port logistics intelligence with dynamic pipeline tracking to optimize terminal operations. EXPLANATION: This project uses real-time stream telemetry to mitigate port maritime queue bottlenecks and predict supply chain delivery cycles.

projects_bi.title: 2019 | Web Systems & Data Engineer (ArcelorMittal)
projects_bi.desc: DEVELOPMENT: Engineered automated data pipelines to extract and process raw industrial data for operational auditing. EXPLANATION: Built full-stack automation scripts with Python and SQL to handle over 10k monthly rows, streamlining manufacturing data consolidation by 30%.

projects_bi.title: 2018 | Automation & Telemetry Analyst (Vale S.A.)
projects_bi.desc: DEVELOPMENT: Automated key performance indicators (KPIs) by constructing custom data workflows and responsive visual data structures. EXPLANATION: Deployed live corporate telemetry dashboards using Python, R, and Power BI to support real-time high-level executive decision-making.

projects_translation.title: 2020 | Website Localization Specialist (Murakami's Platform: International Press website)
projects_translation.desc: DEVELOPMENT: Executed website localization, internationalization testing, and cross-cultural UI translation. EXPLANATION: Adapted complex digital assets and product documentation to ensure a native user experience (UX) for global users during multilingual deployment.

projects_translation.title: 2023 | AI Translation & LLM Coordinator (CTecL)
projects_translation.desc: DEVELOPMENT: Investigated how large language models (LLMs) and advanced NLP tools handle poetic rhythm and meter across multilingual corpora. EXPLANATION: Managed independent computational linguistic datasets to evaluate machine translation output and reduce model bias.

projects_translation.title: 2024 | Dataset Evaluator & MTPE Specialist (CTecL)
projects_translation.desc: DEVELOPMENT: Performed high-volume Machine Translation Post-Editing (MTPE) and structured linguistic annotation workflows. EXPLANATION: Curated trilingual datasets (EN/ES/PT), ensuring absolute terminological precision and data integrity for legal and technical documentation frameworks.

projects_about.title: 2025 | Co-Author & Published Literary Translator
projects_about.desc: DEVELOPMENT: Co-translated and published the traditional poetry book 'Ora ga haru: minha primavera' (2025). EXPLANATION: Applied advanced cross-cultural translation frameworks to preserve delicate structural, rhythmic, and semantic styles across international literary markets.

projects_about.title: 2022 | NLP Research Engineer (Haikai Data Project)
projects_about.desc: DEVELOPMENT: Developed custom text analysis algorithms and structured linguistic databases to extract text patterns. EXPLANATION: Engineered automated text processing pipelines with Python (Pandas/NumPy) to parse high-volume unstructured creative datasets.

projects_about.title: 2021 | Data Pipeline Developer (Reler & Fazer Framework)
projects_about.desc: DEVELOPMENT: Constructed automated textual data processing pipelines and maintained relational database metrics. EXPLANATION: Used clean full-stack web data technologies including JavaScript, PHP, and MySQL to streamline multi-disciplinary academic content delivery.

projects_about.title: 2012 - 2023 | Academic Degrees & Diplomas (IFES)
projects_about.desc: DEVELOPMENT: Completed official continuous multi-disciplinary certifications including Computer Science Technical Diploma, Licentiate degree in Letters, and Graduate Certificate in Special Education Management. EXPLANATION: Built a specialized dual foundation balancing computational data systems with advanced linguistic text processing.
